name: Vanilla Ice Cream Spectacular
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk in a 3-quart saucepan over low heat until hot.
2. Gradually add sugar mixture to milk, stirring until blended.
3. Cook over medium heat for 15 minutes or until thickened, stirring constantly.
4. Stir about one-fourth of the hot mixture into beaten eggs; add to remaining hot mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Cook for 1 minute and remove from heat. Let cool.
6. Chill at least 2 hours.
7. Combine half-and-three-fourths and vanilla in a large bowl; add chilled custard, stirring with a wire whisk.
8. Pour into freezer can of a 1-gallon hand-turned or electric freezer. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
9. Let ripen for 1-1/2 to 2 hours.
